title: Fluffy Saudia Pineapple Stir-fry
description: A cozy saudi arabian dish featuring pineapple juice and caramelize, made with fermented ingredients for a unique flavor profile, suitable for kosher diets.

ingredients.name: 3 tablespoons fermented pineapple juice
ingredients.notes: ensure it is safe to consume and in proper quantity

instructions: Wash and chop the pineapple into small pieces.
Place chopped pineapple in a large mixing bowl. Add kosher salt and mix well until evenly distributed.
Add fermented pineapple juice to the pineapple mixture, stirring constantly for about 5 minutes or until the juices are completely absorbed and the mixture is sticky.
Stir in honey or sugar gradually to achieve desired sweetness level. Mix thoroughly.
Transfer the mixture onto a non-stick skillet or shallow pan and place over medium heat.
Cook, continuously mixing with a spatula, for about 15-20 minutes until the pineapple mixture caramelizes evenly on the bottom of the pan. Be cautious not to burn it.
The dish should be well-cooked throughout but still have some texture, indicating that it has been left in the skillet long enough without burning.
Serve warm as a side dish or use it as topping for rice, pita bread, or other dishes.
